title: Server actions: family management
body:
## Context
Members manage their own family details and household members. Follows the server action pattern from `src/actions/announcements.ts`.

## What to do

### Create `src/actions/family.ts`

**`updateFamilyDetails(prevState, formData)`**
- Validate with Zod, auth check
- Member can only update their own family (check `profile.family_id`)
- Updates family_name, phone, address
- `revalidatePath('/member')`

**`addFamilyMember(prevState, formData)`**
- Validate, auth check
- Inserts into `family_members` for the member's own family
- `revalidatePath('/member')`

**`removeFamilyMember(prevState, formData)`**
- Validate, auth check
- Can only remove from own family
- Cannot remove the head of household (self)
- `revalidatePath('/member')`

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Members can edit their own family details
- [ ] Members can add/remove family members
- [ ] Members cannot modify other families
- [ ] Head of household cannot be removed

## Dependencies
- #145 (families table)
- #146 (family_members table)
- #150 (validators)
